note: Official product page describing PPG's automotive OEM coatings, product technologies, global color leadership, and manufacturing-line support.

note: Market-data source for PPG Industries' June 2026 market capitalization and market-cap history.

note: Market-data source for PPG Industries' trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: CoolPaint - An Open Source Passively Cooling Paint
note: Open-source coating project used as a concrete alternative and enabler for open formulation and community testing concepts.

title: Replicating Materials Library
note: OSHWA-certified open-source materials library used as an enabler for distributed materials documentation and local production concepts.

title: openLCA
note: Open-source life-cycle assessment tool used as an alternative analysis layer for transparent coating-product and environmental comparisons.
